rationale: Trial/program name is the strongest family anchor; drug+disease alone would blur UNITI/IM-UNITI with other ustekinumab Crohn resources.
UNIFI is the specific UC ustekinumab trial family; use the trial name rather than broad IL12_23_UC.
ACT1 is explicit in GEO and separates this from other infliximab UC cohorts despite same publication family with DS063.
No trial name is explicit; source cohort/institution plus drug+disease/publication anchor is clearer than forcing ACT1 or using broad infliximab_UC.
PROgECT is the trial-family anchor; drug+disease alone would hide clinical-trial provenance and could collide with future golimumab UC rows.
BERGAMOT cohort 1 is the trial-family anchor; broad anti_integrin_Crohn would overgroup unrelated etrolizumab/vedolizumab programs.
GEMINI identifies the vedolizumab trial source, but the IFX comparator means the family label should warn that it is mixed rather than purely vedolizumab.
